findings.description: The candidate rule set is completely empty, missing crucial design guidelines from the source document (u_design_pattern_rules_5_0001 through u_design_pattern_rules_5_0003) for iconography styling, color palette constraint, and minimum email dimensions.

rules.description: Icons must use a minimal line illustration style with consistent stroke weight, rounded line caps, and single-color line work.
Icon colors and backgrounds must only be adjusted within the brand palette.
Icons must have a minimum render size of 32x32px in email and default to Brand Blue strokes on light backgrounds to ensure contrast and scale for low-vision audiences.
